{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201812BE7F9D6DE2C06CC6BD25"}"},"total":664},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616150053730599705","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"神书!真乃神书!
唐家三少看了要落泪，天蚕土豆见了得叹服!此乃四
大名著再世，21世纪文坛魁首!《圣墟》?在它面前失
了几分文采！《斗破》?在它面前欠了些许内涵！《诛
仙》?在它面前淡了缕缕情愫！《遮天》?在它面前逊了
三分想象！《佛本》?在它面前缺了半成布局!此乃网文
百年不遇之经典！21世纪最伟大的文学巨
著!
从罗贯中、施耐庵、吴承恩、曹雪芹，到孔墨老庄、
诗仙诗圣、三苏稼轩;自秦皇汉武、唐宗宋祖、成吉
思汗，至释迦牟尼、柏拉图、哥白尼、亚里士多德
-谁读了不拍案叫绝?!
作者此书，实乃天人之笔!文采斐
然，辞藻精妙，承
魏晋风骨，扬唐宋神韵，入木三分!有生之年得见此
书，实乃三生之幸!
然，读罢此书，一股悲怆骤然而生:如此神作，若日
后无缘再见，吾生何趣?吾生何趣?!
幸而!当机立断，收入书架!躁动之心，方得片刻安
宁。
然则!此等神作，若明珠图蒙尘，世人不得见，岂非暴
殄天物，枉费作者心血?!
经一番天人交战，终是痛下决心:牺牲小我，成全大
我!
这书评，献于世人共赏!此书，定要一顶再顶，顶至
九天云霄，让天下皆知!
纵横江湖上，江河湖海作凭:此书过瘾否？--不
够!
伫立仙山巅，琼楼玉宇回响:更新够快否?
不够！不够！远远不够!
章节不够！速度不够!内容不够!统统不够![加油]
[加油][加油][加油][加油]
行走天地间，骄阳明月为证:此书够爽否？--不
够!"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773278713,"group_id":"7505113599702993982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0Ia7j3BRPKzVJpWy3xImdlOfOiCiRQBx+IFStyLTZ/g","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3734406884759864","user_name":"爱吃生姜汤的吴梦瑶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3734406884759864","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7505113599702993982","book_info":{"abstract":"格兰：“维斯，我这里有全宇宙最美味的食物，你要尝尝吗？”
维斯：“想骗我救你？别傻了......真香！！”
格兰：“维斯先生，我想学破坏规则，我想学自在极意.....”
维斯：“别傻了，你怎么可能学得会......什么，你怎么那么快领悟第二层忘我心境了？什么，你又学会破坏规则了？？”
比鲁斯：“小子，看你天赋不错，让你成为我的候选人吧！”
象帕：“好可恶呀，那瘦排骨竟然有这一位天赋这么好的候选人！”
芭朵斯：“这小家伙好厉害，竟然连天使御技都学会了！”
大神官：“格兰这小子该不会有一天要超越我吧？”
全王：“......他已经超越你了，他现在要向我挑战了呢！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a7ba1cf36a381fc19b9c3d4f64d0892","author":"欧阳小白","author_id":"","book_id":"7505113599702993982","book_name":"龙珠：维斯和比鲁斯是我师父","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":376,"name":"龙珠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=376&name=龙珠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7505113662294590014","read_count":"56077","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1252793"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"529","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,龙珠,开局,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2c3391a7c580b4a3df1d8b4eb9094aae~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365892&x-signature=zZ1iNUQfrnJ%2BRlAGnJxxaKYv7C8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"972388293152638","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"274"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201812BE7F9D6DE2C06CC6BD25"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_co
